## Laptop model

(e.g. ASUS ROG Zephyrus G14 GA402RK)

## Hardware

- **CPU**: (e.g. AMD Ryzen 9 6900HS)
- **GPU**: (e.g. AMD Radeon RX 6800S)
- **Distro & kernel**: (e.g. Fedora 40, kernel 6.8)
- **asusd version**: (run `asusctl --version`)

## `--probe` output

```
(paste the full output of `armoury --probe` here)
```

## What works

- [ ] Dashboard (CPU/GPU/fans/battery telemetry)
- [ ] Power profiles (switching works)
- [ ] Battery charge limit
- [ ] Keyboard backlight
- [ ] Aura LED effects
- [ ] Fan curves
- [ ] Network tab
- [ ] Processes tab

## Issues or missing features

Describe anything that shows "n/a", errors, or behaves unexpectedly.

## Screenshots (optional)

If possible, share a screenshot or `asciinema` recording of the TUI running.
